title: sarcolaenaceae
intro: The sarcolaenaceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants. It is a taxonomic rank that groups together closely related genera that share similar characteristics and evolutionary history. The Sarcolaenaceae family is a small and ancient group of plants, primarily found in the tropical forests of Madagascar and surrounding regions. This family is notable for its unique and often rare species, many of which have adapted to the island's specific environmental conditions.
